questions.question: What is the technical name for the chemical reaction between sugars and proteins that makes seared steak taste better than boiled steak?
questions.explanation: The Maillard reaction is a form of non-enzymatic browning that occurs when cooking foods at temperatures between 140 to 165 °C.
